implemented_change.summary: Drive claim_context under the v1 10% unknown threshold with deterministic same-source claim, presentation, and recurring-agenda lanes.

rules.name: source_stated_subject_claims
required_signals: object is a claim record from the same source
relation has evidence from its source
mixed delivered plus planned/proposed lifecycle text remains unknown
missing relation evidence, source mismatches, no-proposed, and will-not-be-implemented text remain unknown

rules.name: evidenced_presented_to_audiences
required_signals: subject is an entity or event
object is a board/committee/community-board audience entity
relation has evidence from its source

rules.name: recurring_agenda_items
required_signals: object is a same-source claim with relation evidence

verification.result: passed: Materialized 93067/98119 submissions; SQLite FTS quick_check ok
claim_context 73/815 unknown, 9.0%; all Plan 004 target families under 10%

intentionally_unresolved: Small residual relation kinds outside has_claim, presented_to, and recurring agenda items remain unknown.
Mixed current/future has_claim rows remain unknown unless an older specific rule safely classifies them.
Source mismatches and missing relation evidence remain unknown.
Future presentation scheduling, not-presented, no-meeting, no-item, cancelled, and deferred presentation rows remain unknown.
next_candidate_lanes: Plan 004 deterministic cleanup is complete for v1 because claim_context, corridor_scope, metric_context, route_scope, timeline_context, and treatment_context are all under 10% unknown.
Do not broaden claim_context further for v1 unless downstream consumers expose a concrete residual gap.
